extensionDescription.message: Integrate Letterboxd and IMDb seamlessly. View IMDb ratings on Letterboxd, add quick links to Google search results.

optImdbDesc.message: Open the IMDb page in a new tab when you click the IMDb icon on Letterboxd.

optLbDesc.message: Open the Letterboxd page in a new tab when you click the Letterboxd icon on IMDb.

optCtxDesc.message: Open context menu searches silently in the background.

optGoogleDesc.message: Add a Letterboxd icon next to IMDb links in Google search results.

optShowIconLbLabel.message: Show IMDb Icon on Letterboxd Page

optShowIconImdbLabel.message: Show Letterboxd Icon on IMDb Page

optGoogleNewTabDesc.message: Open the Letterboxd page in a new tab when you click the icon on Google.

optHistoryDesc.message: Your search history is saved locally on this browser and never sent to any servers.

optAutoRedirectDesc.message: When on Netflix, Max, Prime, MUBI, Disney, Apple or IMDb pages, clicking the toolbar icon redirects directly to Letterboxd without showing the popup.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Access the world of cinema with one click.

pinAdvantage1.message: 🚀 1-Click Search: Quickly search movies from any tab.

pinAdvantage2.message: 🍿 Auto-Redirect: Jump directly to Letterboxd from content pages on Netflix, Prime, Max, IMDb, etc.

pinAdvantage3.message: ▶️ Smart Badge: See a badge indicator when a movie is detected on a supported platform.

pinInstructionChrome.message: Click the Puzzle (Extensions) icon on the toolbar and click the Pin icon next to Letterboxd Search.

pinInstructionFirefox.message: Click the Extensions (Puzzle) icon on the toolbar, right-click Letterboxd Search and select 'Pin to Toolbar'.
